steps.title: Rewrite the root
steps.content:
An eighth root is the same as raising to the $\frac{1}{8}$ power.
$$
\sqrt[8]{x^5}=(x^5)^{\frac{1}{8}}
$$

steps.title: Apply the power rule
steps.content: When a power is raised to another power, multiply the exponents. $$ (x^5)^{\frac{1}{8}}=x^{\frac{5}{8}} $$ Since the expression is $x^m$, $m=\frac{5}{8}$. The answer is 5/8.
